name: knuckle-biometric-project
description: Root runner for the knuckle biometric backend and frontend

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.check: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache ./.venv/bin/python -m py_compile backend/*.py && npm --prefix frontend run build
